objective.description_ko: 삼림의 세 번째 RPG 탄약 상자에 VOG-25 Khattabka 수류탄을 은닉하라
objective.description_ja: Woodsの3番目のRPG弾薬箱にVOG-25 Khattabka手榴弾を隠す

objective.description_en: Locate the fallen plane
objective.description_ko: 추락한 비행기를 찾으세요.
objective.description_ja: 墜落した飛行機を特定する

requirement.description_en: Visit one of the following locations. (Pick 1)
requirement.description_ko: 다음 장소 중 한 곳을 방문하십시오 (택1)
requirement.description_ja: 次の場所のいずれかを訪れてください。（1択）

objective.description_en: Retrieve the plane's flight recorder
objective.description_ko: 비행기의 flight recorder를 회수하세요.
objective.description_ja: 飛行機のflight recorderを回収する

requirement.description_en: Pick up and read EMERCOM leaflet or Note by Item #1156 from one of the following locations. (Pick 1)
requirement.description_ko: 다음 장소 중 한 곳에서 EMERCOM 전단지 또는 Item #1156 메모를 획득하여 읽으세요. (택1)
requirement.description_ja: 以下の場所のいずれかから、EMERCOMのチラシまたはアイテム#1156のメモを拾って読んでください。（1択）

objective.description_en: Retrieve the armored case
objective.description_ko: armored case를 회수하세요.
objective.description_ja: armored caseを回収する

objective.description_en: (Optional) Find any additional clues
objective.description_ko: (선택) 추가 단서를 찾으세요.
objective.description_ja: （任意）追加のヒントを見つける

objective.description_en: (Optional) Locate and obtain the Bogatyr squad patch in Woods
objective.description_ko: (선택) Bogatyr 분대의 패치를 삼림에서 찾아 획득하세요.
objective.description_ja: （任意）WoodsでBogatyr部隊のパッチを特定し、入手する

objective.description_en: Locate the Ryabina outpost
objective.description_ko: Ryabina 초소를 찾으세요.
objective.description_ja: Ryabina出張所を特定する

objective.description_en: Find more information about the Bogatyr squad
objective.description_ko: Bogatyr 분대에 대한 추가 정보를 찾으세요.
objective.description_ja: Bogatyr部隊に関する詳細情報を探す

requirement.description_en: Pick up and read Note about the Eye of the World from one of the following locations (Pick 1)
requirement.description_ko: 다음 장소 중 한 곳에서 세상의 눈에 관한 메모를 획득하여 읽으십시오. (택1)
requirement.description_ja: 以下の場所のいずれかから、「Eye of the World」に関するメモを拾って読んでください。（1択）

objective.description_en: (Optional) Locate and obtain a keepsake of one of the Bogatyrs
objective.description_ko: (선택) Bogatyr 분대원 중 한 명의 유품을 찾아 획득하세요.
objective.description_ja: （任意）Bogatyr部隊員の形見を特定し、入手する

objective.description_en: Locate the ambush spot
objective.description_ko: 매복 지점을 찾으세요.
objective.description_ja: 待ち伏せ地点を特定する

objective.description_en: Inspect Moreman's body
objective.description_ko: Moreman의 시신을 조사하세요.
objective.description_ja: Moremanの遺体を調べる

objective.description_en: Figure out how the cultists are connected to the General
objective.description_ko: 이교도들이 장군과 어떻게 연결되어 있는지 파악하세요.
objective.description_ja: カルト教徒がどのように将軍と繋がっているのか解明する

objective.description_en: Investigate the cultists' house marked with the Eye of the World
objective.description_ko: Eye of the World 표식이 있는 광신도의 집을 조사하세요.
objective.description_ja: Eye of the Worldのマークがあるカルトの家を調査する
